title: Exposure of Sensitive Data Due to Lack of Data Classification
description: Without a defined data classification policy and enforcement mechanisms, sensitive data (e.g., personally identifiable information (PII), financial data) may be handled with inadequate security controls. This increases the risk of data breaches and unauthorized disclosure.
affected_component: All Data Storage and Processing Components
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to databases, misconfigured servers, insecure APIs, or vulnerabilities in the application code.
mitigations: Implement a data classification policy defining data sensitivity levels.
Apply appropriate access controls based on data classification.
Encrypt sensitive data at rest and in transit.
